creator: tremere@cainites.net
text:
Created attachment 196881
Update PowerDNS Authoritative Server to 4.1.4

This maintenance release features several bug fixes. The two most important being a fix in the handling of child-zones with DNS UPDATE and one where orphaned record comments would mess up records returned by the API.

Full changelog: https://doc.powerdns.com/authoritative/changelog/4.1.html#change-4.1.4

Buildlog: https://pkg.cainites.net/data/latest-per-pkg/powerdns/4.1.4/freebsd_11x64-system.log

- Enabled SQLite3 backend as default now, since BIND+DNSSEC requires it.
